h77ffbe1dg90f6g41c2gaa1bg3a8f7c28ba55: I thought you'd help me. I thought we'd help each other. Instead you chose this.
he689ce87g134cg45adga52cgac1dce2202e8: The grove stood for generations. It was our link to Silvanus. Now it's nothing but blood and ashes - thanks to you.
h4e3f2fd7g3ef5g4e44gb153gd780f615870d: Tell me... was it worth it?
hfbab0874g30b8g4794gbc0fg9b9ccac4f784: Wait... who the Hells are you?
h0ef3030dg17fcg46f7g9fbeg4f8dc97ce5ff: I am Halsin. First Druid of the Emerald Grove. And I am here to visit nature's fury upon you.
h06cefe2bg6507g48f2g9b48g369f434f5ceb: Of course - I did what I had to do. Your grove got in the way.
h14fc1502gf2dcg4716g8f84g1f5ebc1467ad: You have no idea what you've done, do you? Or perhaps you simply don't care?
h7c02d24ag3d9dg4ad4g81d0gc866dc95348c: You have upended nature's balance. Only your death can restore it.
h52d6590bg1b3dg4b41gb707gbd42ed7aff0c: I'm sorry. I had no choice.
hb95cbb9bg65d8g40f5gaa40g93baaabd8165: There's always a choice - but you made yours. Now I make mine.
h8d0301fegaac1g458dg895bg720c3663cdd8: Calm down. Come sit by the fire and we can talk this over.
h1970349agffb7g4a79gb4cdg6a6b3da63ca3: There's nothing left to be said. My mercy died when I saw the grove.
h1af2c27ag861cg4c53gb3degeb2b084e45db: When I met you, I thought we were destined to be allies. But you made that impossible.
h5519ce62g5fb6g4235g9e58g4739e4a4441d: Look at you - camping amidst the Oak Father's creations, as if you hadn't just defiled his most sacred ground.
